metadata.description: Open source collection of GitHub Copilot plugins, agents, skills, and prompts

plugins.name: nodejs-sonarqube-cloud
plugins.description: An agent that analyses SonarQube Cloud quality gate results from the CI pipeline, triages all issues, and implements fixes automatically. Includes a skill for running local scans via sonar-scanner-cli.

plugins.name: asyncapi-drift-detection
plugins.description: Detects drift between AsyncAPI spec (version 3.x) and service implementation, prioritises findings in order of severity, and proposes fixes to ensure service implementation is accurately reflected in its documentation.

plugins.name: openapi-drift-detection
plugins.description: Detects drift between OpenAPI spec and service implementation, prioritises findings in order of severity, and proposes fixes to ensure service implementation is accurately reflected in its documentation.
